---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the infrastructure or the dashboard
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
Thanks for the suggestion!

Note: substantial features in this repo are planned through the awos
spec workflow (spec → tech → tasks → implement). For a large change,
this request will likely become the starting point for a spec rather
than a direct PR. Small, self-contained enhancements can go straight
to a PR.
-->

## Problem / motivation (the "why")

<!-- What problem does this solve? What's painful or missing today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the change you'd like. Be as concrete as you can. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you weighed and why you set them aside. -->

## Area this touches

- [ ] Infrastructure (Terraform / AWS / WireGuard)
- [ ] Dashboard (Go app / web UI)
- [ ] Both
- [ ] Other / not sure

## Additional context

<!-- Links, references, screenshots, related specs/issues, or anything else. -->
